stageName: Nice → Auron (shortened to Le Broc → Isola, 47 km)
tldr: Snow and rain forced the queen stage to be shortened twice on the day — first from 138.7 km to 120 km when snow blocked Auron, then to a final 47 km from Le Broc to Isola after heavy rain made the lower roads unsafe. The shortened race produced a reduced-bunch result with no meaningful GC change.

narrative.headline: Weather neutralises the queen stage twice
narrative.body:
Initial plan: 138.7 km, mountain-top finish at Auron. First revision: 120 km, finish moved to Isola. Second revision: neutralised until km 73, riders bussed to Le Broc, only the final 47 km from there to Isola were actually raced.

The 47 km version was a short uphill drag run in winter conditions and ended in a reduced-bunch finish. GC effectively unchanged from Stage 5.

gcImpact.headline: Stage cut, GC unchanged
gcImpact.body: Weather neutralisation means Vingegaard's overall lead survives without challenge.

controversies.description: Stage shortened twice during the day. Initial route 138.7 km to Auron, then reduced to 120 km finishing in Isola, finally neutralised until km 73 with riders bussed to Le Broc — only the final 47 km were actually raced.
